title: Mute all notifications except those in automations
excerpt:

posts.author: khickson (Karen Hickson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a high volume board that would send dozens of ‘assign’ notifications at a time if notifications aren’t muted.

To allow item creators the option to be notified I have a status column with a yes/no selection that item creators can set to Yes if they want to be notified. I then have an automation the triggers to notify them when the ‘Yes’ condition is met.

my issue is that because I’ve muted all notification to avoid spamming them with assign notifications, they also don’t get the automation notification.

If anyone has a workaround I’d be happy to hear it.

posts.author: wolffygooffy (Samsul Arif)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a question and the same problem that occurred with @khickson … Can someone help me or provide the best solution? Thank you so much.
